objective: Enable only the three approved read-only ORIS tools through the existing native OpenClaw plugin, verify natural-language typed-tool use and privacy-safe latency telemetry, and preserve automatic rollback to the tools-denied state. Do not add write actions in this task.

architecture_decision.plugin_role: typed read-only ORIS tools and sanitized lifecycle telemetry
architecture_decision.agent_harness_role: backend policy, routing, structured output and fallback
architecture_decision.oris_role: project authorization, task lifecycle, queue, leases, cancellation, retry, evidence and audit
architecture_decision.codex_role: real implementation, test, repair, commit and controlled push

third_run.root_cause: OpenClaw 2026.5.19 forbids non-empty tools.allow and tools.alsoAllow in the same policy scope.

latest_failure_analysis.observed_boundary: The candidate, Gateway restart, Skill visibility, plugin runtime inventory, three ORIS direct calls and queue-after-direct-call check all passed. Failure occurred before the first native Agent acceptance turn.
latest_failure_analysis.root_cause: The automatic acceptance path still executed a stale policy selftest after mutation. That test asserted the removed dual-scope behavior that materialized both tools.allow and tools.alsoAllow. The production policy implementation correctly uses one scope, so the obsolete assertion raised AssertionError.
latest_failure_analysis.root_cause_source: deterministic source-path inspection; the sanitized evidence intentionally did not retain a traceback

controlled_activation_gate.retry_authorization_condition: A new diagnostic-only run must pass automatic selftests, source governance, native candidate dry-run and final no-mutation invariants; its GitHub evidence must then be reviewed.

blocked_reason: The stale post-mutation selftest has been remediated in code, but a controlled enablement retry remains prohibited until a new diagnostic-only run verifies the remediation and its GitHub evidence is reviewed.
next_action: Pull latest main and run scripts/dev_employee_diagnose_openclaw_readonly_policy.sh exactly once. This verification is diagnostic-only and must leave active config, Gateway, queue and product unchanged.
next_action_requirements: pull latest origin/main on the ORIS development/control host
do not run the enablement entrypoint
verify automatic policy, Skill, telemetry correlation and output metadata selftests pass before any mutation
verify the single-scope native config patch dry-run passes
verify Gateway remains healthy without restart
verify queue and product remain unchanged
do not add write tools or submit a product task
do not touch the production host
commercial_sequence_after_p0: complete native read-only tool and telemetry acceptance
establish real privacy-safe model/tool/agent latency baselines
design typed write actions with approval, RBAC, project authorization, idempotency and audit
add generic project onboarding and capability discovery
move routine Provider, Model and Policy management to controlled Admin UI
add monitoring, privacy/retention, backup/restore and disaster recovery
add multi-tenant identity, quotas, metering and commercial packaging
